title: Signal Green Tea - Herbal Toothpaste 3 x 100ml
description: Product Description Active Formula - cooling sensation to whole mouth - Herbal Green Tea Essence Directions Apply a grain amount paste to the brush, brush your teeth in a circular motion for at least two minutes, focus on all areas of the mouth and rinse thoroughly with water. Safety Warning For external use only. Do not swallow. Keep out of reach of children. Discontinue use and consult a dentist if irritation occurs. See more
